action.reasoning: Observation: iter 14 training with longitude shift augmentation, dropout=0.15, cosine annealing achieved val_rmse_z500 (norm)=1.0366, better than iter 8's 1.0738 (which gave raw rmse_z500=452.07). Analysis: The improved validation suggests raw rmse_z500 will be lower. Remaining time 0.34h (20 min) allows eval. Decision: Submit eval for logs/iter_14/best_model.pt to measure new best. Then decide if time remains for further quick training.
